	<span>
		🔥🔥🔥 News
	</span>
</h2>
<ul>
<li>🚀 Dec 23, 2025: Fp8 gemm inference is supported! 🔥🔥🔥🆕</li>
<li>🚀 Dec 05, 2025: <strong>New Release</strong>: We now release the <a href="https://huggingface.co/tencent/HunyuanVideo-1.5/tree/main/transformer/480p_i2v_step_distilled" rel="nofollow">480p I2V step-distilled model</a>, which generates videos in 8 or 12 steps (recommended)! On RTX 4090, end-to-end generation time is reduced by 75%, and a single RTX 4090 can generate videos within <strong>75 seconds</strong>. The step-distilled model maintains comparable quality to the original model while achieving significant speedup. See <a href="/tencent/HunyuanVideo-1.5/blob/main/./assets/step_distillation_comparison.md" rel="nofollow">Step Distillation Comparison</a> for detailed quality comparisons. For even faster generation, you can also try 4 steps (faster speed with slightly reduced quality). <strong>To enable the step-distilled model, run <code>generate.py</code> with the <code>--enable_step_distill</code> parameter.</strong> See <a href="#-usage" rel="nofollow">Usage</a> for detailed usage instructions. 🔥🔥🔥🆕</li>
<li>📚 Dec 05, 2025: <strong>Training Code & LoRA Tuning Script Released</strong>: We now open-source the training code for HunyuanVideo-1.5! The training script (<code>train.py</code>) provides a full training pipeline with support for distributed training, FSDP, context parallel, gradient checkpointing, and more. HunyuanVideo-1.5 is trained using the Muon optimizer, which we have open-sourced in the <a href="#-training" rel="nofollow">Training</a> section. <strong>If you would like to continue training our model or fine-tune it with LoRA, please use the Muon optimizer.</strong> See <a href="#-training" rel="nofollow">Training</a> section for detailed usage instructions. 🔥🔥🔥🆕</li>
<li>🎉 <strong>Diffusers Support</strong>: HunyuanVideo-1.5 is now available on Hugging Face Diffusers! Check out <a href="https://huggingface.co/collections/hunyuanvideo-community/hunyuanvideo-15" rel="nofollow">Diffusers collection</a> for easy integration. 🔥🔥🔥🆕</li>
<li>🚀 Nov 27, 2025: We now support cache inference (deepcache, teacache, taylorcache), achieving significant speedup! Pull the latest code to try it.</li>
<li>🚀 Nov 24, 2025: We now support deepcache inference.</li>
<li>👋 Nov 20, 2025: We release the inference code and model weights of HunyuanVideo-1.5.</li>
</ul>

	<span>
		🧩 Community Contributions
	</span>
</h2>
<p>If you develop/use HunyuanVideo-1.5 in your projects, welcome to let us know.</p>
<ul>
<li><p><strong>Diffusers</strong> - <a href="https://huggingface.co/collections/hunyuanvideo-community/hunyuanvideo-15" rel="nofollow">HunyuanVideo-1.5 Diffusers</a>: Official Hugging Face Diffusers integration for HunyuanVideo-1.5. Easily use HunyuanVideo-1.5 with the Diffusers library for seamless integration into your projects. See <a href="#usage-with-diffusers" rel="nofollow">Usage with Diffusers</a> section for details.</p>
</li>
<li><p><strong>ComfyUI</strong> - <a href="https://github.com/comfyanonymous/ComfyUI" rel="nofollow">ComfyUI</a>: A powerful and modular diffusion model GUI with a graph/nodes interface. ComfyUI supports HunyuanVideo-1.5 with various engineering optimizations for fast inference. We provide a <a href="/tencent/HunyuanVideo-1.5/blob/main/./ComfyUI/README.md" rel="nofollow">ComfyUI Usage Guide</a> for HunyuanVideo-1.5.</p>
</li>
<li><p><strong>Community-implemented ComfyUI Plugin</strong> - <a href="https://github.com/yuanyuan-spec/comfyui_hunyuanvideo_1.5_plugin" rel="nofollow">comfyui_hunyuanvideo_1.5_plugin</a>: A community-implemented ComfyUI plugin for HunyuanVideo-1.5, offering both simplified and complete node sets for quick usage or deep workflow customization, with built-in automatic model download support.</p>
</li>
<li><p><strong>LightX2V</strong> - <a href="https://github.com/ModelTC/LightX2V" rel="nofollow">LightX2V</a>: A lightweight and efficient video generation framework that integrates HunyuanVideo-1.5, supporting multiple engineering acceleration techniques for fast inference.</p>
</li>
<li><p><strong>Wan2GP v9.62</strong> - <a href="https://github.com/deepbeepmeep/Wan2GP" rel="nofollow">Wan2GP</a>: WanGP is a very low VRAM app (as low 6 GB of VRAM for Hunyuan Video 1.5) supports Lora Accelerator for a 8 steps generation and offers tools to facilitate Video Generation.</p>
</li>
<li><p><strong>ComfyUI-MagCache</strong> - <a href="https://github.com/Zehong-Ma/ComfyUI-MagCache" rel="nofollow">ComfyUI-MagCache</a>: MagCache is a training-free caching approach that accelerates video generation by estimating fluctuating differences among model outputs across timesteps. It achieves 1.7x speedup for HunyuanVideo-1.5 with 20 inference steps.</p>
</li>
</ul>

<h2 class="relative group flex items-baseline">
	<a id="📖-introduction" class="block pr-1.5 text-lg md:absolute md:p-1.5 md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100 md:right-full" href="#📖-introduction" rel="nofollow">
		<span class="header-link"><svg class="text-gray-500 hover:text-black dark:hover:text-gray-200 w-4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="1em" height="1em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 256 256"><path d="M167.594 88.393a8.001 8.001 0 0 1 0 11.314l-67.882 67.882a8 8 0 1 1-11.314-11.315l67.882-67.881a8.003 8.003 0 0 1 11.314 0zm-28.287 84.86l-28.284 28.284a40 40 0 0 1-56.567-56.567l28.284-28.284a8 8 0 0 0-11.315-11.315l-28.284 28.284a56 56 0 0 0 79.196 79.197l28.285-28.285a8 8 0 1 0-11.315-11.314zM212.852 43.14a56.002 56.002 0 0 0-79.196 0l-28.284 28.284a8 8 0 1 0 11.314 11.314l28.284-28.284a40 40 0 0 1 56.568 56.567l-28.285 28.285a8 8 0 0 0 11.315 11.314l28.284-28.284a56.065 56.065 0 0 0 0-79.196z" fill="currentColor"></path></svg></span>
	</a>
	<span>
		📖 Introduction
	</span>
</h2>
<p>We present HunyuanVideo-1.5, a lightweight yet powerful video generation model that achieves state-of-the-art visual quality and motion coherence with only 8.3 billion parameters, enabling efficient inference on consumer-grade GPUs. This achievement is built upon several key components, including meticulous data curation, an advanced DiT architecture with selective and sliding tile attention(SSTA), enhanced bilingual understanding through glyph-aware text encoding , progressive pre-training and post-training, and an efficient video super-resolution network. Leveraging these designs, we developed a unified framework capable of high-quality text-to-video and image-to-video generation across multiple durations and resolutions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that this compact and proficient model establishes a new state-of-the-art among open-source models. By releasing the code and weights of HunyuanVideo-1.5, we provide the community with a high-performance foundation that significantly lowers the cost of video creation and research, making advanced video generation more accessible to all.</p>
<h2 class="relative group flex items-baseline">
	<a id="✨-key-features" class="block pr-1.5 text-lg md:absolute md:p-1.5 md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100 md:right-full" href="#✨-key-features" rel="nofollow">
		<span class="header-link"><svg class="text-gray-500 hover:text-black dark:hover:text-gray-200 w-4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="1em" height="1em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 256 256"><path d="M167.594 88.393a8.001 8.001 0 0 1 0 11.314l-67.882 67.882a8 8 0 1 1-11.314-11.315l67.882-67.881a8.003 8.003 0 0 1 11.314 0zm-28.287 84.86l-28.284 28.284a40 40 0 0 1-56.567-56.567l28.284-28.284a8 8 0 0 0-11.315-11.315l-28.284 28.284a56 56 0 0 0 79.196 79.197l28.285-28.285a8 8 0 1 0-11.315-11.314zM212.852 43.14a56.002 56.002 0 0 0-79.196 0l-28.284 28.284a8 8 0 1 0 11.314 11.314l28.284-28.284a40 40 0 0 1 56.568 56.567l-28.285 28.285a8 8 0 0 0 11.315 11.314l28.284-28.284a56.065 56.065 0 0 0 0-79.196z" fill="currentColor"></path></svg></span>
	</a>
	<span>
		✨ Key Features
	</span>
</h2>
<ul>
<li><strong>Lightweight High-Performance Architecture</strong>: We propose an efficient architecture that integrates an 8.3B-parameter Diffusion Transformer (DiT) with a 3D causal VAE, achieving compression ratios of 16× in spatial dimensions and 4× along the temporal axis. Additionally, the innovative SSTA (Selective and Sliding Tile Attention) mechanism prunes redundant spatiotemporal kv blocks, significantly reduces computational overhead for long video sequences and accelerates inference, achieving an end-to-end speedup of $1.87 \times$ in 10-second 720p video synthesis compared to FlashAttention-3.</li>
</ul>
<div align="center">
<img src="/tencent/HunyuanVideo-1.5/resolve/main/assets/hy_video_1_5_dit.png" alt="HunyuanVideo-1.5 DiT" width="600">
</div> 


<ul>
<li><strong>Video Super-Resolution Enhancement</strong>: We develop an efficient few-step super-resolution network that upscales outputs to 1080p. It enhances sharpness while correcting distortions, thereby refining details and overall visual texture.</li>
</ul>
<div align="center">
<img src="/tencent/HunyuanVideo-1.5/resolve/main/assets/hy_video_1_5_vsr.png" alt="HunyuanVideo-1.5 VSR" width="600">
</div> 

<ul>
<li><strong>End-to-End Training Optimization</strong>: This work employs a multi-stage, progressive training strategy covering the entire pipeline from pre-training to post-training. Combined with the Muon optimizer to accelerate convergence, this approach holistically refines motion coherence, aesthetic quality, and human preference alignment, achieving professional-grade content generation.</li>
</ul>

		<span class="header-link"><svg class="text-gray-500 hover:text-black dark:hover:text-gray-200 w-4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="1em" height="1em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 256 256"><path d="M167.594 88.393a8.001 8.001 0 0 1 0 11.314l-67.882 67.882a8 8 0 1 1-11.314-11.315l67.882-67.881a8.003 8.003 0 0 1 11.314 0zm-28.287 84.86l-28.284 28.284a40 40 0 0 1-56.567-56.567l28.284-28.284a8 8 0 0 0-11.315-11.315l-28.284 28.284a56 56 0 0 0 79.196 79.197l28.285-28.285a8 8 0 1 0-11.315-11.314zM212.852 43.14a56.002 56.002 0 0 0-79.196 0l-28.284 28.284a8 8 0 1 0 11.314 11.314l28.284-28.284a40 40 0 0 1 56.568 56.567l-28.285 28.285a8 8 0 0 0 11.315 11.314l28.284-28.284a56.065 56.065 0 0 0 0-79.196z" fill="currentColor"></path></svg></span>

	<span>
		Hardware Requirements
	</span>
</h3>
<ul>
<li><p><strong>GPU</strong>: NVIDIA GPU with CUDA support</p>
</li>
<li><p><strong>Minimum GPU Memory</strong>: 14 GB (with model offloading enabled)</p>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Note:</strong> The memory requirements above are measured with model offloading enabled. If your GPU has sufficient memory, you may disable offloading for improved inference speed.</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
</ul>

	<span>
		Software Requirements
	</span>
</h3>
<ul>
<li><strong>Operating System</strong>: Linux</li>
<li><strong>Python</strong>: Python 3.10 or higher</li>
<li><strong>CUDA</strong>: Compatible CUDA version for your PyTorch installation</li>
</ul>

	</a>
	<span>
		Step 3: Install Attention Libraries
	</span>
</h3>
<ul>
<li><p>Flash Attention: 
Install Flash Attention for faster inference and reduced GPU memory consumption.
Detailed installation instructions are available at <a href="https://github.com/Dao-AILab/flash-attention" rel="nofollow">Flash Attention</a>.</p>
</li>
<li><p>Flex-Block-Attention: 
flex-block-attn is only required for sparse attention to achieve faster inference and can be installed by the following command:</p>
<div class="relative group repo-copy-code"><pre><code class="language-bash">git <span class="hljs-built_in">clone</span> https://github.com/Tencent-Hunyuan/flex-block-attn.git
<span class="hljs-built_in">cd</span> flex-block-attn
git submodule update --init --recursive
python3 setup.py install
</code></pre><button class="absolute top-3 right-3 transition opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-80"><svg class="" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" fill="currentColor" focusable="false" role="img" width="0.9em" height="0.9em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 32 32"><path d="M28,10V28H10V10H28m0-2H10a2,2,0,0,0-2,2V28a2,2,0,0,0,2,2H28a2,2,0,0,0,2-2V10a2,2,0,0,0-2-2Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><path d="M4,18H2V4A2,2,0,0,1,4,2H18V4H4Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><rect fill="none" width="32" height="32"></rect></svg></button></div>
</li>
<li><p>SageAttention: 
To enable SageAttention for faster inference, you need to install it by the following command:</p>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Note</strong>: Enabling SageAttention will automatically disable Flex-Block-Attention.</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="relative group repo-copy-code"><pre><code class="language-bash">git <span class="hljs-built_in">clone</span> https://github.com/cooper1637/SageAttention.git
<span class="hljs-built_in">cd</span> SageAttention 
<span class="hljs-built_in">export</span> EXT_PARALLEL=4 NVCC_APPEND_FLAGS=<span class="hljs-string">"--threads 8"</span> MAX_JOBS=32 <span class="hljs-comment"># Optional</span>
python3 setup.py install
</code></pre><button class="absolute top-3 right-3 transition opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-80"><svg class="" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" fill="currentColor" focusable="false" role="img" width="0.9em" height="0.9em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 32 32"><path d="M28,10V28H10V10H28m0-2H10a2,2,0,0,0-2,2V28a2,2,0,0,0,2,2H28a2,2,0,0,0,2-2V10a2,2,0,0,0-2-2Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><path d="M4,18H2V4A2,2,0,0,1,4,2H18V4H4Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><rect fill="none" width="32" height="32"></rect></svg></button></div>
</li>
<li><p>SGL-Kernel:
To enable fp8 gemm for transformer, you need to install it by the following command:</p>
<div class="relative group repo-copy-code"><pre><code class="language-bash">pip install sgl-kernel==0.3.18
</code></pre><button class="absolute top-3 right-3 transition opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-80"><svg class="" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" fill="currentColor" focusable="false" role="img" width="0.9em" height="0.9em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 32 32"><path d="M28,10V28H10V10H28m0-2H10a2,2,0,0,0-2,2V28a2,2,0,0,0,2,2H28a2,2,0,0,0,2-2V10a2,2,0,0,0-2-2Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><path d="M4,18H2V4A2,2,0,0,1,4,2H18V4H4Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><rect fill="none" width="32" height="32"></rect></svg></button></div>
</li>
</ul>

	<a id="prompt-writing-handbook" class="block pr-1.5 text-lg md:absolute md:p-1.5 md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100 md:right-full" href="#prompt-writing-handbook" rel="nofollow">
		<span class="header-link"><svg class="text-gray-500 hover:text-black dark:hover:text-gray-200 w-4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="1em" height="1em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 256 256"><path d="M167.594 88.393a8.001 8.001 0 0 1 0 11.314l-67.882 67.882a8 8 0 1 1-11.314-11.315l67.882-67.881a8.003 8.003 0 0 1 11.314 0zm-28.287 84.86l-28.284 28.284a40 40 0 0 1-56.567-56.567l28.284-28.284a8 8 0 0 0-11.315-11.315l-28.284 28.284a56 56 0 0 0 79.196 79.197l28.285-28.285a8 8 0 1 0-11.315-11.314zM212.852 43.14a56.002 56.002 0 0 0-79.196 0l-28.284 28.284a8 8 0 1 0 11.314 11.314l28.284-28.284a40 40 0 0 1 56.568 56.567l-28.285 28.285a8 8 0 0 0 11.315 11.314l28.284-28.284a56.065 56.065 0 0 0 0-79.196z" fill="currentColor"></path></svg></span>

	<span>
		Prompt Writing Handbook
	</span>
</h3>
<p>Prompt enhancement plays a crucial role in enabling our model to generate high-quality videos. By writing longer and more detailed prompts, the generated video will be significantly improved. We encourage you to craft comprehensive and descriptive prompts to achieve the best possible video quality. we recommend community partners consulting our official guide on how to write effective prompts. </p>
<p><strong>Reference:</strong> <strong><a href="https://github.com/Tencent-Hunyuan/HunyuanVideo-1.5/blob/main/assets/HunyuanVideo_1_5_Prompt_Handbook_EN.md" rel="nofollow">HunyuanVideo-1.5 Prompt Handbook</a></strong></p>
<h3 class="relative group flex items-baseline">
	<a id="system-prompts-for-automatic-prompt-enhancement" class="block pr-1.5 text-lg md:absolute md:p-1.5 md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100 md:right-full" href="#system-prompts-for-automatic-prompt-enhancement" rel="nofollow">
		<span class="header-link"><svg class="text-gray-500 hover:text-black dark:hover:text-gray-200 w-4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="1em" height="1em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 256 256"><path d="M167.594 88.393a8.001 8.001 0 0 1 0 11.314l-67.882 67.882a8 8 0 1 1-11.314-11.315l67.882-67.881a8.003 8.003 0 0 1 11.314 0zm-28.287 84.86l-28.284 28.284a40 40 0 0 1-56.567-56.567l28.284-28.284a8 8 0 0 0-11.315-11.315l-28.284 28.284a56 56 0 0 0 79.196 79.197l28.285-28.285a8 8 0 1 0-11.315-11.314zM212.852 43.14a56.002 56.002 0 0 0-79.196 0l-28.284 28.284a8 8 0 1 0 11.314 11.314l28.284-28.284a40 40 0 0 1 56.568 56.567l-28.285 28.285a8 8 0 0 0 11.315 11.314l28.284-28.284a56.065 56.065 0 0 0 0-79.196z" fill="currentColor"></path></svg></span>
	</a>
	<span>
		System Prompts for Automatic Prompt Enhancement
	</span>
</h3>
<p>For users seeking to optimize prompts for other large models, it is recommended to consult the definition of <code>t2v_rewrite_system_prompt</code> in the file <code>hyvideo/utils/rewrite/t2v_prompt.py</code> to guide text-to-video rewriting. Similarly, for image-to-video rewriting, refer to the definition of <code>i2v_rewrite_system_prompt</code> in <code>hyvideo/utils/rewrite/i2v_prompt.py</code>.</p>
<h2 class="relative group flex items-baseline">
	<a id="🔑-inference" class="block pr-1.5 text-lg md:absolute md:p-1.5 md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100 md:right-full" href="#🔑-inference" rel="nofollow">
		<span class="header-link"><svg class="text-gray-500 hover:text-black dark:hover:text-gray-200 w-4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="1em" height="1em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 256 256"><path d="M167.594 88.393a8.001 8.001 0 0 1 0 11.314l-67.882 67.882a8 8 0 1 1-11.314-11.315l67.882-67.881a8.003 8.003 0 0 1 11.314 0zm-28.287 84.86l-28.284 28.284a40 40 0 0 1-56.567-56.567l28.284-28.284a8 8 0 0 0-11.315-11.315l-28.284 28.284a56 56 0 0 0 79.196 79.197l28.285-28.285a8 8 0 1 0-11.315-11.314zM212.852 43.14a56.002 56.002 0 0 0-79.196 0l-28.284 28.284a8 8 0 1 0 11.314 11.314l28.284-28.284a40 40 0 0 1 56.568 56.567l-28.285 28.285a8 8 0 0 0 11.315 11.314l28.284-28.284a56.065 56.065 0 0 0 0-79.196z" fill="currentColor"></path></svg></span>
	</a>
	<span>
		🔑 Inference
	</span>
</h2>
<h3 class="relative group flex items-baseline">
	<a id="inference-with-source-code" class="block pr-1.5 text-lg md:absolute md:p-1.5 md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100 md:right-full" href="#inference-with-source-code" rel="nofollow">
		<span class="header-link"><svg class="text-gray-500 hover:text-black dark:hover:text-gray-200 w-4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="1em" height="1em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 256 256"><path d="M167.594 88.393a8.001 8.001 0 0 1 0 11.314l-67.882 67.882a8 8 0 1 1-11.314-11.315l67.882-67.881a8.003 8.003 0 0 1 11.314 0zm-28.287 84.86l-28.284 28.284a40 40 0 0 1-56.567-56.567l28.284-28.284a8 8 0 0 0-11.315-11.315l-28.284 28.284a56 56 0 0 0 79.196 79.197l28.285-28.285a8 8 0 1 0-11.315-11.314zM212.852 43.14a56.002 56.002 0 0 0-79.196 0l-28.284 28.284a8 8 0 1 0 11.314 11.314l28.284-28.284a40 40 0 0 1 56.568 56.567l-28.285 28.285a8 8 0 0 0 11.315 11.314l28.284-28.284a56.065 56.065 0 0 0 0-79.196z" fill="currentColor"></path></svg></span>
	</a>
	<span>
		Inference with Source Code
	</span>
</h3>
<p>For prompt rewriting, we recommend using Gemini or models deployed via vLLM. This codebase currently only supports models compatible with the vLLM API. If you wish to use Gemini, you will need to implement your own interface calls.</p>
<p>For models with a vLLM API, note that T2V (text-to-video) and I2V (image-to-video) have different recommended models and environment variables:</p>
<ul>
<li>T2V: use <a href="https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking-2507" rel="nofollow">Qwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking-2507</a>, configure <code>T2V_REWRITE_BASE_URL</code> and <code>T2V_REWRITE_MODEL_NAME</code></li>
<li>I2V: use <a href="https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen3-VL-235B-A22B-Instruct" rel="nofollow">Qwen3-VL-235B-A22B-Instruct</a>, configure <code>I2V_REWRITE_BASE_URL</code> and <code>I2V_REWRITE_MODEL_NAME</code></li>
</ul>
<blockquote>
<p>You may set the above model names to any other vLLM-compatible models you have deployed (including HuggingFace models).<br>Rewriting is enabled by default (<code>--rewrite</code> defaults to <code>true</code>); to disable it explicitly, use <code>--rewrite false</code> or <code>--rewrite 0</code>. If no vLLM endpoint is configured, the pipeline runs without remote rewriting.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>Example: Generate a video (works for both T2V and I2V; set <code>IMAGE_PATH=none</code> for T2V or provide an image path for I2V)</p>
<blockquote>
<p>💡 <strong>Tip</strong>: For faster inference speed, you can enable the step-distilled model using the <code>--enable_step_distill</code> parameter. The step-distilled model (480p I2V) can generate videos in 8 or 12 steps (recommended), achieving up to 75% speedup on RTX 4090 while maintaining comparable quality.</p>
<p><strong>Tips:</strong> If your GPU memory is > 14GB but you encounter OOM (Out of Memory) errors during generation, you can try setting the following environment variable before running:</p>
<div class="relative group repo-copy-code"><pre><code class="language-bash"><span class="hljs-built_in">export</span> PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True,max_split_size_mb:128
</code></pre><button class="absolute top-3 right-3 transition opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-80"><svg class="" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" fill="currentColor" focusable="false" role="img" width="0.9em" height="0.9em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 32 32"><path d="M28,10V28H10V10H28m0-2H10a2,2,0,0,0-2,2V28a2,2,0,0,0,2,2H28a2,2,0,0,0,2-2V10a2,2,0,0,0-2-2Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><path d="M4,18H2V4A2,2,0,0,1,4,2H18V4H4Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><rect fill="none" width="32" height="32"></rect></svg></button></div>
<p><strong>Tips:</strong> If you have limited CPU memory and encounter OOM during inference, you can try disable overlapped group offloading by adding the following argument:</p>
<div class="relative group repo-copy-code"><pre><code class="language-bash">--overlap_group_offloading <span class="hljs-literal">false</span>
</code></pre><button class="absolute top-3 right-3 transition opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-80"><svg class="" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" fill="currentColor" focusable="false" role="img" width="0.9em" height="0.9em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 32 32"><path d="M28,10V28H10V10H28m0-2H10a2,2,0,0,0-2,2V28a2,2,0,0,0,2,2H28a2,2,0,0,0,2-2V10a2,2,0,0,0-2-2Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><path d="M4,18H2V4A2,2,0,0,1,4,2H18V4H4Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><rect fill="none" width="32" height="32"></rect></svg></button></div>
</blockquote>
<div class="relative group repo-copy-code"><pre><code class="language-bash"><span class="hljs-built_in">export</span> T2V_REWRITE_BASE_URL=<span class="hljs-string">"<your_vllm_server_base_url>"</span>
<span class="hljs-built_in">export</span> T2V_REWRITE_MODEL_NAME=<span class="hljs-string">"<your_model_name>"</span>
<span class="hljs-built_in">export</span> I2V_REWRITE_BASE_URL=<span class="hljs-string">"<your_vllm_server_base_url>"</span>
<span class="hljs-built_in">export</span> I2V_REWRITE_MODEL_NAME=<span class="hljs-string">"<your_model_name>"</span>

PROMPT=<span class="hljs-string">'A girl holding a paper with words "Hello, world!"'</span>

IMAGE_PATH=/path/to/image.png <span class="hljs-comment"># Optional, none or <image path> to enable i2v mode</span>
SEED=1
ASPECT_RATIO=16:9
RESOLUTION=480p
OUTPUT_PATH=./outputs/output.mp4
MODEL_PATH=./ckpts <span class="hljs-comment"># Path to pretrained model</span>

<span class="hljs-comment"># Configuration for faster inference</span>
N_INFERENCE_GPU=8 <span class="hljs-comment"># Parallel inference GPU count</span>
CFG_DISTILLED=<span class="hljs-literal">true</span> <span class="hljs-comment"># Inference with CFG distilled model, 2x speedup</span>
SAGE_ATTN=<span class="hljs-literal">true</span> <span class="hljs-comment"># Inference with SageAttention</span>
SPARSE_ATTN=<span class="hljs-literal">false</span> <span class="hljs-comment"># Inference with sparse attention (only 720p models are equipped with sparse attention). Please ensure flex-block-attn is installed</span>
OVERLAP_GROUP_OFFLOADING=<span class="hljs-literal">true</span> <span class="hljs-comment"># Only valid when group offloading is enabled, significantly increases CPU memory usage but speeds up inference</span>
ENABLE_CACHE=<span class="hljs-literal">true</span> <span class="hljs-comment"># Enable feature cache during inference. Significantly speeds up inference.</span>
CACHE_TYPE=deepcache <span class="hljs-comment"># Support: deepcache, teacache, taylorcache</span>
ENABLE_STEP_DISTILL=<span class="hljs-literal">true</span> <span class="hljs-comment"># Enable step distilled model for 480p I2V, recommended 8 or 12 steps, up to 6x speedup</span>


<span class="hljs-comment"># Configuration for better quality</span>
REWRITE=<span class="hljs-literal">true</span> <span class="hljs-comment"># Enable prompt rewriting. Please ensure rewrite vLLM server is deployed and configured.</span>
ENABLE_SR=<span class="hljs-literal">true</span> <span class="hljs-comment"># Enable super resolution</span>


torchrun --nproc_per_node=<span class="hljs-variable">$N_INFERENCE_GPU</span> generate.py \
  --prompt <span class="hljs-string">"<span class="hljs-variable">$PROMPT</span>"</span> \
  --image_path <span class="hljs-variable">$IMAGE_PATH</span> \
  --resolution <span class="hljs-variable">$RESOLUTION</span> \
  --aspect_ratio <span class="hljs-variable">$ASPECT_RATIO</span> \
  --seed <span class="hljs-variable">$SEED</span> \
  --rewrite <span class="hljs-variable">$REWRITE</span> \
  --cfg_distilled <span class="hljs-variable">$CFG_DISTILLED</span> \
  --enable_step_distill <span class="hljs-variable">$ENABLE_STEP_DISTILL</span> \
  --sparse_attn <span class="hljs-variable">$SPARSE_ATTN</span> --use_sageattn <span class="hljs-variable">$SAGE_ATTN</span> \
  --enable_cache <span class="hljs-variable">$ENABLE_CACHE</span> --cache_type <span class="hljs-variable">$CACHE_TYPE</span> \
  --overlap_group_offloading <span class="hljs-variable">$OVERLAP_GROUP_OFFLOADING</span> \
  --sr <span class="hljs-variable">$ENABLE_SR</span> --save_pre_sr_video \
  --output_path <span class="hljs-variable">$OUTPUT_PATH</span> \
  --model_path <span class="hljs-variable">$MODEL_PATH</span>
</code></pre><button class="absolute top-3 right-3 transition opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-80"><svg class="" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" fill="currentColor" focusable="false" role="img" width="0.9em" height="0.9em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 32 32"><path d="M28,10V28H10V10H28m0-2H10a2,2,0,0,0-2,2V28a2,2,0,0,0,2,2H28a2,2,0,0,0,2-2V10a2,2,0,0,0-2-2Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><path d="M4,18H2V4A2,2,0,0,1,4,2H18V4H4Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><rect fill="none" width="32" height="32"></rect></svg></button></div>
<h3 class="relative group flex items-baseline">
	<a id="command-line-arguments" class="block pr-1.5 text-lg md:absolute md:p-1.5 md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100 md:right-full" href="#command-line-arguments" rel="nofollow">
		<span class="header-link"><svg class="text-gray-500 hover:text-black dark:hover:text-gray-200 w-4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="1em" height="1em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 256 256"><path d="M167.594 88.393a8.001 8.001 0 0 1 0 11.314l-67.882 67.882a8 8 0 1 1-11.314-11.315l67.882-67.881a8.003 8.003 0 0 1 11.314 0zm-28.287 84.86l-28.284 28.284a40 40 0 0 1-56.567-56.567l28.284-28.284a8 8 0 0 0-11.315-11.315l-28.284 28.284a56 56 0 0 0 79.196 79.197l28.285-28.285a8 8 0 1 0-11.315-11.314zM212.852 43.14a56.002 56.002 0 0 0-79.196 0l-28.284 28.284a8 8 0 1 0 11.314 11.314l28.284-28.284a40 40 0 0 1 56.568 56.567l-28.285 28.285a8 8 0 0 0 11.315 11.314l28.284-28.284a56.065 56.065 0 0 0 0-79.196z" fill="currentColor"></path></svg></span>
	</a>
	<span>
		Command Line Arguments
	</span>
</h3>
<div class="max-w-full overflow-auto">
	<table>
		<thead><tr>
<th>Argument</th>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Required</th>
<th>Default</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>

		</thead><tbody><tr>
<td><code>--prompt</code></td>
<td>str</td>
<td>Yes</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>Text prompt for video generation</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--negative_prompt</code></td>
<td>str</td>
<td>No</td>
<td><code>''</code></td>
<td>Negative prompt for video generation</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--resolution</code></td>
<td>str</td>
<td>Yes</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>Video resolution: <code>480p</code> or <code>720p</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--model_path</code></td>
<td>str</td>
<td>Yes</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>Path to pretrained model directory</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--aspect_ratio</code></td>
<td>str</td>
<td>No</td>
<td><code>16:9</code></td>
<td>Aspect ratio of the output video</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--num_inference_steps</code></td>
<td>int</td>
<td>No</td>
<td><code>50</code></td>
<td>Number of inference steps</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--video_length</code></td>
<td>int</td>
<td>No</td>
<td><code>121</code></td>
<td>Number of frames to generate</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--seed</code></td>
<td>int</td>
<td>No</td>
<td><code>123</code></td>
<td>Random seed for reproducibility</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--image_path</code></td>
<td>str</td>
<td>No</td>
<td><code>None</code></td>
<td>Path to reference image (enables i2v mode). Use <code>none</code> or <code>None</code> to explicitly use text-to-video mode</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--output_path</code></td>
<td>str</td>
<td>No</td>
<td><code>None</code></td>
<td>Output file path (if not provided, saves to <code>./outputs/output_{transformer_version}_{timestamp}.mp4</code>)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--sr</code></td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>No</td>
<td><code>true</code></td>
<td>Enable super resolution (use <code>--sr false</code> or <code>--sr 0</code> to disable)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--save_pre_sr_video</code></td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>No</td>
<td><code>false</code></td>
<td>Save original video before super resolution (use <code>--save_pre_sr_video</code> or <code>--save_pre_sr_video true</code> to enable, only effective when super resolution is enabled)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--rewrite</code></td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>No</td>
<td><code>true</code></td>
<td>Enable prompt rewriting (use <code>--rewrite false</code> or <code>--rewrite 0</code> to disable, may result in lower quality video generation)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--cfg_distilled</code></td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>No</td>
<td><code>false</code></td>
<td>Enable CFG distilled model for faster inference (~2x speedup, use <code>--cfg_distilled</code> or <code>--cfg_distilled true</code> to enable)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--enable_step_distill</code></td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>No</td>
<td><code>false</code></td>
<td>Enable step distilled model for 480p I2V (recommended 8 or 12 steps, ~75% speedup on RTX 4090, use <code>--enable_step_distill</code> or <code>--enable_step_distill true</code> to enable)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--sparse_attn</code></td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>No</td>
<td><code>false</code></td>
<td>Enable sparse attention for faster inference (~1.5-2x speedup, requires H-series GPUs, auto-enables CFG distilled, use <code>--sparse_attn</code> or <code>--sparse_attn true</code> to enable)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--offloading</code></td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>No</td>
<td><code>true</code></td>
<td>Enable CPU offloading (use <code>--offloading false</code> or <code>--offloading 0</code> to disable for faster inference if GPU memory allows)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--group_offloading</code></td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>No</td>
<td><code>None</code></td>
<td>Enable group offloading (default: None, automatically enabled if offloading is enabled. Use <code>--group_offloading</code> or <code>--group_offloading true/1</code> to enable, <code>--group_offloading false/0</code> to disable)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--overlap_group_offloading</code></td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>No</td>
<td><code>true</code></td>
<td>Enable overlap group offloading (default: true). Significantly increases CPU memory usage but speeds up inference. Use <code>--overlap_group_offloading</code> or <code>--overlap_group_offloading true/1</code> to enable, <code>--overlap_group_offloading false/0</code> to disable</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--dtype</code></td>
<td>str</td>
<td>No</td>
<td><code>bf16</code></td>
<td>Data type for transformer: <code>bf16</code> (faster, lower memory) or <code>fp32</code> (better quality, slower, higher memory)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--use_sageattn</code></td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>No</td>
<td><code>false</code></td>
<td>Enable SageAttention (use <code>--use_sageattn</code> or <code>--use_sageattn true/1</code> to enable, <code>--use_sageattn false/0</code> to disable)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--sage_blocks_range</code></td>
<td>str</td>
<td>No</td>
<td><code>0-53</code></td>
<td>SageAttention blocks range (e.g., <code>0-5</code> or <code>0,1,2,3,4,5</code>)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--enable_cache</code></td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>No</td>
<td><code>false</code></td>
<td>Enable cache for transformer (use <code>--enable_cache</code> or <code>--enable_cache true/1</code> to enable, <code>--enable_cache false/0</code> to disable)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--cache_type</code></td>
<td>str</td>
<td>No</td>
<td><code>deepcache</code></td>
<td>Cache type for transformer (e.g., <code>deepcache, teacache, taylorcache</code>)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--no_cache_block_id</code></td>
<td>str</td>
<td>No</td>
<td><code>53</code></td>
<td>Blocks to exclude from deepcache (e.g., <code>0-5</code> or <code>0,1,2,3,4,5</code>)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--cache_start_step</code></td>
<td>int</td>
<td>No</td>
<td><code>11</code></td>
<td>Start step to skip when using cache</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--cache_end_step</code></td>
<td>int</td>
<td>No</td>
<td><code>45</code></td>
<td>End step to skip when using cache</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--total_steps</code></td>
<td>int</td>
<td>No</td>
<td><code>50</code></td>
<td>Total inference steps</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--cache_step_interval</code></td>
<td>int</td>
<td>No</td>
<td><code>4</code></td>
<td>Step interval to skip when using cache</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
	</table>
</div>
<p><strong>Note:</strong> Use <code>--nproc_per_node</code> to specify the number of GPUs. For example, <code>--nproc_per_node=8</code> uses 8 GPUs.</p>
<h3 class="relative group flex items-baseline">
	<a id="optimal-inference-configurations" class="block pr-1.5 text-lg md:absolute md:p-1.5 md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100 md:right-full" href="#optimal-inference-configurations" rel="nofollow">

		<span class="header-link"><svg class="text-gray-500 hover:text-black dark:hover:text-gray-200 w-4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="1em" height="1em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 256 256"><path d="M167.594 88.393a8.001 8.001 0 0 1 0 11.314l-67.882 67.882a8 8 0 1 1-11.314-11.315l67.882-67.881a8.003 8.003 0 0 1 11.314 0zm-28.287 84.86l-28.284 28.284a40 40 0 0 1-56.567-56.567l28.284-28.284a8 8 0 0 0-11.315-11.315l-28.284 28.284a56 56 0 0 0 79.196 79.197l28.285-28.285a8 8 0 1 0-11.315-11.314zM212.852 43.14a56.002 56.002 0 0 0-79.196 0l-28.284 28.284a8 8 0 1 0 11.314 11.314l28.284-28.284a40 40 0 0 1 56.568 56.567l-28.285 28.285a8 8 0 0 0 11.315 11.314l28.284-28.284a56.065 56.065 0 0 0 0-79.196z" fill="currentColor"></path></svg></span>
	</a>
	<span>
		Usage with Diffusers
	</span>
</h3>
<p>HunyuanVideo-1.5 is available on Hugging Face Diffusers! You can easily use it with the Diffusers library:</p>
<p><strong>Basic Usage:</strong></p>
<div class="relative group repo-copy-code"><pre><code class="language-python"><span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> torch

dtype = torch.bfloat16
device = <span class="hljs-string">"cuda:0"</span>

<span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> diffusers <span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> HunyuanVideo15Pipeline
<span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> diffusers.utils <span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> export_to_video

pipe = HunyuanVideo15Pipeline.from_pretrained(<span class="hljs-string">"hunyuanvideo-community/HunyuanVideo-1.5-Diffusers-720p_t2v"</span>, torch_dtype=dtype)
pipe.enable_model_cpu_offload()
pipe.vae.enable_tiling()

generator = torch.Generator(device=device).manual_seed(seed)

video = pipe(
    prompt=prompt,
    generator=generator,
    num_frames=<span class="hljs-number">121</span>,
    num_inference_steps=<span class="hljs-number">50</span>,
).frames[<span class="hljs-number">0</span>]

export_to_video(video, <span class="hljs-string">"output.mp4"</span>, fps=<span class="hljs-number">24</span>)
</code></pre><button class="absolute top-3 right-3 transition opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-80"><svg class="" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" fill="currentColor" focusable="false" role="img" width="0.9em" height="0.9em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 32 32"><path d="M28,10V28H10V10H28m0-2H10a2,2,0,0,0-2,2V28a2,2,0,0,0,2,2H28a2,2,0,0,0,2-2V10a2,2,0,0,0-2-2Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><path d="M4,18H2V4A2,2,0,0,1,4,2H18V4H4Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><rect fill="none" width="32" height="32"></rect></svg></button></div>
<p><strong>Optimized Usage with Attention Backend:</strong></p>
<p>HunyuanVideo-1.5 uses attention masks with variable-length sequences. For best performance, we recommend using an attention backend that handles padding efficiently.</p>
<p>We recommend installing kernels (<code>pip install kernels</code>) to access prebuilt attention kernels.</p>
<div class="relative group repo-copy-code"><pre><code class="language-python"><span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> torch

dtype = torch.bfloat16
device = <span class="hljs-string">"cuda:0"</span>

<span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> diffusers <span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> HunyuanVideo15Pipeline, attention_backend
<span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> diffusers.utils <span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> export_to_video

pipe = HunyuanVideo15Pipeline.from_pretrained(<span class="hljs-string">"hunyuanvideo-community/HunyuanVideo-1.5-Diffusers-720p_t2v"</span>, torch_dtype=dtype)
pipe.enable_model_cpu_offload()
pipe.vae.enable_tiling()

generator = torch.Generator(device=device).manual_seed(seed)

<span class="hljs-keyword">with</span> attention_backend(<span class="hljs-string">"_flash_3_hub"</span>): <span class="hljs-comment"># or `"flash_hub"` if you are not on H100/H800</span>
    video = pipe(
        prompt=prompt,
        generator=generator,
        num_frames=<span class="hljs-number">121</span>,
        num_inference_steps=<span class="hljs-number">50</span>,
    ).frames[<span class="hljs-number">0</span>]
    export_to_video(video, <span class="hljs-string">"output.mp4"</span>, fps=<span class="hljs-number">24</span>)
</code></pre><button class="absolute top-3 right-3 transition opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-80"><svg class="" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" fill="currentColor" focusable="false" role="img" width="0.9em" height="0.9em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 32 32"><path d="M28,10V28H10V10H28m0-2H10a2,2,0,0,0-2,2V28a2,2,0,0,0,2,2H28a2,2,0,0,0,2-2V10a2,2,0,0,0-2-2Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><path d="M4,18H2V4A2,2,0,0,1,4,2H18V4H4Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><rect fill="none" width="32" height="32"></rect></svg></button></div>
<p>For more details, please visit <a href="https://huggingface.co/collections/hunyuanvideo-community/hunyuanvideo-15" rel="nofollow">HunyuanVideo-1.5 Diffusers Collection</a>.</p>
<h2 class="relative group flex items-baseline">
	<a id="🎓-training" class="block pr-1.5 text-lg md:absolute md:p-1.5 md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100 md:right-full" href="#🎓-training" rel="nofollow">
		<span class="header-link"><svg class="text-gray-500 hover:text-black dark:hover:text-gray-200 w-4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="1em" height="1em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 256 256"><path d="M167.594 88.393a8.001 8.001 0 0 1 0 11.314l-67.882 67.882a8 8 0 1 1-11.314-11.315l67.882-67.881a8.003 8.003 0 0 1 11.314 0zm-28.287 84.86l-28.284 28.284a40 40 0 0 1-56.567-56.567l28.284-28.284a8 8 0 0 0-11.315-11.315l-28.284 28.284a56 56 0 0 0 79.196 79.197l28.285-28.285a8 8 0 1 0-11.315-11.314zM212.852 43.14a56.002 56.002 0 0 0-79.196 0l-28.284 28.284a8 8 0 1 0 11.314 11.314l28.284-28.284a40 40 0 0 1 56.568 56.567l-28.285 28.285a8 8 0 0 0 11.315 11.314l28.284-28.284a56.065 56.065 0 0 0 0-79.196z" fill="currentColor"></path></svg></span>
	</a>
	<span>
		🎓 Training
	</span>
</h2>
<p>HunyuanVideo-1.5 is trained using the <strong>Muon optimizer</strong>, which accelerates convergence and improves training stability. The Muon optimizer combines momentum-based updates with Newton-Schulz orthogonalization for efficient optimization of large-scale video generation models.</p>
<h3 class="relative group flex items-baseline">
	<a id="quick-start" class="block pr-1.5 text-lg md:absolute md:p-1.5 md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100 md:right-full" href="#quick-start" rel="nofollow">
		<span class="header-link"><svg class="text-gray-500 hover:text-black dark:hover:text-gray-200 w-4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="1em" height="1em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 256 256"><path d="M167.594 88.393a8.001 8.001 0 0 1 0 11.314l-67.882 67.882a8 8 0 1 1-11.314-11.315l67.882-67.881a8.003 8.003 0 0 1 11.314 0zm-28.287 84.86l-28.284 28.284a40 40 0 0 1-56.567-56.567l28.284-28.284a8 8 0 0 0-11.315-11.315l-28.284 28.284a56 56 0 0 0 79.196 79.197l28.285-28.285a8 8 0 1 0-11.315-11.314zM212.852 43.14a56.002 56.002 0 0 0-79.196 0l-28.284 28.284a8 8 0 1 0 11.314 11.314l28.284-28.284a40 40 0 0 1 56.568 56.567l-28.285 28.285a8 8 0 0 0 11.315 11.314l28.284-28.284a56.065 56.065 0 0 0 0-79.196z" fill="currentColor"></path></svg></span>
	</a>
	<span>
		Quick Start
	</span>
</h3>
<p>The training script (<code>train.py</code>) provides a complete training pipeline for HunyuanVideo-1.5. Here's how to use it:</p>
<h4 class="relative group flex items-baseline">
	<a id="1-implement-your-dataloader" class="block pr-1.5 text-lg md:absolute md:p-1.5 md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100 md:right-full" href="#1-implement-your-dataloader" rel="nofollow">
		<span class="header-link"><svg class="text-gray-500 hover:text-black dark:hover:text-gray-200 w-4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="1em" height="1em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 256 256"><path d="M167.594 88.393a8.001 8.001 0 0 1 0 11.314l-67.882 67.882a8 8 0 1 1-11.314-11.315l67.882-67.881a8.003 8.003 0 0 1 11.314 0zm-28.287 84.86l-28.284 28.284a40 40 0 0 1-56.567-56.567l28.284-28.284a8 8 0 0 0-11.315-11.315l-28.284 28.284a56 56 0 0 0 79.196 79.197l28.285-28.285a8 8 0 1 0-11.315-11.314zM212.852 43.14a56.002 56.002 0 0 0-79.196 0l-28.284 28.284a8 8 0 1 0 11.314 11.314l28.284-28.284a40 40 0 0 1 56.568 56.567l-28.285 28.285a8 8 0 0 0 11.315 11.314l28.284-28.284a56.065 56.065 0 0 0 0-79.196z" fill="currentColor"></path></svg></span>
	</a>
	<span>
		1. Implement Your DataLoader
	</span>
</h4>
<p>Replace the <code>create_dummy_dataloader()</code> function in <code>train.py</code> with your own implementation. Your dataset's <code>__getitem__</code> method should return a single sample.</p>
<ul>
<li><p><strong>Required fields:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li><code>"pixel_values"</code>: <code>torch.Tensor</code> - Video: <code>[C, F, H, W]</code> or Image: <code>[C, H, W]</code><ul>
<li>Pixel values must be in range <code>[-1, 1]</code> </li>
<li>Note: For video data, temporal dimension F must be <code>4n+1</code> (e.g., 1, 5, 9, 13, 17, ...)</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><code>"text"</code>: <code>str</code> - Text prompt for this sample</li>
<li><code>"data_type"</code>: <code>str</code> - <code>"video"</code> or <code>"image"</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><p><strong>Optional fields (for performance optimization):</strong></p>
<ul>
<li><code>"latents"</code>: Pre-encoded VAE latents (skips VAE encoding for faster training)</li>
<li><code>"byt5_text_ids"</code> and <code>"byt5_text_mask"</code>: Pre-tokenized byT5 inputs</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<p>See the <code>create_dummy_dataloader()</code> function in <code>train.py</code> for detailed format documentation.</p>
<h4 class="relative group flex items-baseline">
	<a id="2-run-training" class="block pr-1.5 text-lg md:absolute md:p-1.5 md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100 md:right-full" href="#2-run-training" rel="nofollow">
		<span class="header-link"><svg class="text-gray-500 hover:text-black dark:hover:text-gray-200 w-4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="1em" height="1em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 256 256"><path d="M167.594 88.393a8.001 8.001 0 0 1 0 11.314l-67.882 67.882a8 8 0 1 1-11.314-11.315l67.882-67.881a8.003 8.003 0 0 1 11.314 0zm-28.287 84.86l-28.284 28.284a40 40 0 0 1-56.567-56.567l28.284-28.284a8 8 0 0 0-11.315-11.315l-28.284 28.284a56 56 0 0 0 79.196 79.197l28.285-28.285a8 8 0 1 0-11.315-11.314zM212.852 43.14a56.002 56.002 0 0 0-79.196 0l-28.284 28.284a8 8 0 1 0 11.314 11.314l28.284-28.284a40 40 0 0 1 56.568 56.567l-28.285 28.285a8 8 0 0 0 11.315 11.314l28.284-28.284a56.065 56.065 0 0 0 0-79.196z" fill="currentColor"></path></svg></span>
	</a>
	<span>
		2. Run Training
	</span>
</h4>
<p><strong>Single GPU:</strong></p>
<div class="relative group repo-copy-code"><pre><code class="language-bash">python train.py --pretrained_model_root <path_to_pretrained_model> [other args]
</code></pre><button class="absolute top-3 right-3 transition opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-80"><svg class="" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" fill="currentColor" focusable="false" role="img" width="0.9em" height="0.9em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 32 32"><path d="M28,10V28H10V10H28m0-2H10a2,2,0,0,0-2,2V28a2,2,0,0,0,2,2H28a2,2,0,0,0,2-2V10a2,2,0,0,0-2-2Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><path d="M4,18H2V4A2,2,0,0,1,4,2H18V4H4Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><rect fill="none" width="32" height="32"></rect></svg></button></div>
<p><strong>Multi-GPU:</strong></p>
<div class="relative group repo-copy-code"><pre><code class="language-bash">N=8
torchrun --nproc_per_node=<span class="hljs-variable">$N</span> train.py --pretrained_model_root <path_to_pretrained_model> [other args]
</code></pre><button class="absolute top-3 right-3 transition opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-80"><svg class="" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" fill="currentColor" focusable="false" role="img" width="0.9em" height="0.9em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 32 32"><path d="M28,10V28H10V10H28m0-2H10a2,2,0,0,0-2,2V28a2,2,0,0,0,2,2H28a2,2,0,0,0,2-2V10a2,2,0,0,0-2-2Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><path d="M4,18H2V4A2,2,0,0,1,4,2H18V4H4Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><rect fill="none" width="32" height="32"></rect></svg></button></div>
<p><strong>Example:</strong></p>
<div class="relative group repo-copy-code"><pre><code class="language-bash">torchrun --nproc_per_node=8 train.py \
  --pretrained_model_root ./ckpts \
  --learning_rate 1e-5 \
  --batch_size 1 \
  --max_steps 10000 \
  --output_dir ./outputs \
  --enable_fsdp \
  --enable_gradient_checkpointing \
  --sp_size 8
</code></pre><button class="absolute top-3 right-3 transition opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-80"><svg class="" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" fill="currentColor" focusable="false" role="img" width="0.9em" height="0.9em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 32 32"><path d="M28,10V28H10V10H28m0-2H10a2,2,0,0,0-2,2V28a2,2,0,0,0,2,2H28a2,2,0,0,0,2-2V10a2,2,0,0,0-2-2Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><path d="M4,18H2V4A2,2,0,0,1,4,2H18V4H4Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><rect fill="none" width="32" height="32"></rect></svg></button></div>
<h4 class="relative group flex items-baseline">
	<a id="3-key-training-parameters" class="block pr-1.5 text-lg md:absolute md:p-1.5 md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100 md:right-full" href="#3-key-training-parameters" rel="nofollow">
		<span class="header-link"><svg class="text-gray-500 hover:text-black dark:hover:text-gray-200 w-4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="1em" height="1em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 256 256"><path d="M167.594 88.393a8.001 8.001 0 0 1 0 11.314l-67.882 67.882a8 8 0 1 1-11.314-11.315l67.882-67.881a8.003 8.003 0 0 1 11.314 0zm-28.287 84.86l-28.284 28.284a40 40 0 0 1-56.567-56.567l28.284-28.284a8 8 0 0 0-11.315-11.315l-28.284 28.284a56 56 0 0 0 79.196 79.197l28.285-28.285a8 8 0 1 0-11.315-11.314zM212.852 43.14a56.002 56.002 0 0 0-79.196 0l-28.284 28.284a8 8 0 1 0 11.314 11.314l28.284-28.284a40 40 0 0 1 56.568 56.567l-28.285 28.285a8 8 0 0 0 11.315 11.314l28.284-28.284a56.065 56.065 0 0 0 0-79.196z" fill="currentColor"></path></svg></span>
	</a>
	<span>
		3. Key Training Parameters
	</span>
</h4>
<div class="max-w-full overflow-auto">
	<table>
		<thead><tr>
<th>Parameter</th>
<th>Description</th>
<th>Default</th>
</tr>

		</thead><tbody><tr>
<td><code>--pretrained_model_root</code></td>
<td>Path to pretrained model (required)</td>
<td>-</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--learning_rate</code></td>
<td>Learning rate</td>
<td>1e-5</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--batch_size</code></td>
<td>Batch size</td>
<td>1</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--max_steps</code></td>
<td>Maximum training steps</td>
<td>10000</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--warmup_steps</code></td>
<td>Warmup steps</td>
<td>500</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--gradient_accumulation_steps</code></td>
<td>Gradient accumulation steps</td>
<td>1</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--enable_fsdp</code></td>
<td>Enable FSDP for distributed training</td>
<td>true</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--enable_gradient_checkpointing</code></td>
<td>Enable gradient checkpointing</td>
<td>true</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--sp_size</code></td>
<td>Sequence parallelism size (must divide world_size)</td>
<td>8</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--i2v_prob</code></td>
<td>Probability of i2v task for video data</td>
<td>0.3</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--use_muon</code></td>
<td>Use Muon optimizer</td>
<td>true</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--resume_from_checkpoint</code></td>
<td>Resume from checkpoint directory</td>
<td>None</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--use_lora</code></td>
<td>Enable LoRA fine-tuning</td>
<td>false</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--lora_r</code></td>
<td>LoRA rank</td>
<td>8</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--lora_alpha</code></td>
<td>LoRA alpha scaling parameter</td>
<td>16</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--lora_dropout</code></td>
<td>LoRA dropout rate</td>
<td>0.0</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--pretrained_lora_path</code></td>
<td>Path to pretrained LoRA adapter</td>
<td>None</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
	</table>
</div>
<h4 class="relative group flex items-baseline">
	<a id="4-monitor-training" class="block pr-1.5 text-lg md:absolute md:p-1.5 md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100 md:right-full" href="#4-monitor-training" rel="nofollow">
		<span class="header-link"><svg class="text-gray-500 hover:text-black dark:hover:text-gray-200 w-4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="1em" height="1em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 256 256"><path d="M167.594 88.393a8.001 8.001 0 0 1 0 11.314l-67.882 67.882a8 8 0 1 1-11.314-11.315l67.882-67.881a8.003 8.003 0 0 1 11.314 0zm-28.287 84.86l-28.284 28.284a40 40 0 0 1-56.567-56.567l28.284-28.284a8 8 0 0 0-11.315-11.315l-28.284 28.284a56 56 0 0 0 79.196 79.197l28.285-28.285a8 8 0 1 0-11.315-11.314zM212.852 43.14a56.002 56.002 0 0 0-79.196 0l-28.284 28.284a8 8 0 1 0 11.314 11.314l28.284-28.284a40 40 0 0 1 56.568 56.567l-28.285 28.285a8 8 0 0 0 11.315 11.314l28.284-28.284a56.065 56.065 0 0 0 0-79.196z" fill="currentColor"></path></svg></span>
	</a>
	<span>
		4. Monitor Training
	</span>
</h4>
<ul>
<li>Checkpoints are saved to <code>output_dir</code> at intervals specified by <code>--save_interval</code></li>
<li>Validation videos are generated at intervals specified by <code>--validation_interval</code></li>
<li>Training logs are printed to console at intervals specified by <code>--log_interval</code></li>
</ul>
<h4 class="relative group flex items-baseline">
	<a id="5-resume-training" class="block pr-1.5 text-lg md:absolute md:p-1.5 md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100 md:right-full" href="#5-resume-training" rel="nofollow">
		<span class="header-link"><svg class="text-gray-500 hover:text-black dark:hover:text-gray-200 w-4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="1em" height="1em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 256 256"><path d="M167.594 88.393a8.001 8.001 0 0 1 0 11.314l-67.882 67.882a8 8 0 1 1-11.314-11.315l67.882-67.881a8.003 8.003 0 0 1 11.314 0zm-28.287 84.86l-28.284 28.284a40 40 0 0 1-56.567-56.567l28.284-28.284a8 8 0 0 0-11.315-11.315l-28.284 28.284a56 56 0 0 0 79.196 79.197l28.285-28.285a8 8 0 1 0-11.315-11.314zM212.852 43.14a56.002 56.002 0 0 0-79.196 0l-28.284 28.284a8 8 0 1 0 11.314 11.314l28.284-28.284a40 40 0 0 1 56.568 56.567l-28.285 28.285a8 8 0 0 0 11.315 11.314l28.284-28.284a56.065 56.065 0 0 0 0-79.196z" fill="currentColor"></path></svg></span>
	</a>
	<span>
		5. Resume Training
	</span>
</h4>
<p>Use <code>--resume_from_checkpoint <checkpoint_dir></code> to resume from a saved checkpoint:</p>
<div class="relative group repo-copy-code"><pre><code class="language-bash">python train.py \
  --pretrained_model_root <path> \
  --resume_from_checkpoint ./outputs/checkpoint-1000
</code></pre><button class="absolute top-3 right-3 transition opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-80"><svg class="" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" fill="currentColor" focusable="false" role="img" width="0.9em" height="0.9em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 32 32"><path d="M28,10V28H10V10H28m0-2H10a2,2,0,0,0-2,2V28a2,2,0,0,0,2,2H28a2,2,0,0,0,2-2V10a2,2,0,0,0-2-2Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><path d="M4,18H2V4A2,2,0,0,1,4,2H18V4H4Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><rect fill="none" width="32" height="32"></rect></svg></button></div>
<h4 class="relative group flex items-baseline">
	<a id="6-lora-fine-tuning" class="block pr-1.5 text-lg md:absolute md:p-1.5 md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100 md:right-full" href="#6-lora-fine-tuning" rel="nofollow">
		<span class="header-link"><svg class="text-gray-500 hover:text-black dark:hover:text-gray-200 w-4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="1em" height="1em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 256 256"><path d="M167.594 88.393a8.001 8.001 0 0 1 0 11.314l-67.882 67.882a8 8 0 1 1-11.314-11.315l67.882-67.881a8.003 8.003 0 0 1 11.314 0zm-28.287 84.86l-28.284 28.284a40 40 0 0 1-56.567-56.567l28.284-28.284a8 8 0 0 0-11.315-11.315l-28.284 28.284a56 56 0 0 0 79.196 79.197l28.285-28.285a8 8 0 1 0-11.315-11.314zM212.852 43.14a56.002 56.002 0 0 0-79.196 0l-28.284 28.284a8 8 0 1 0 11.314 11.314l28.284-28.284a40 40 0 0 1 56.568 56.567l-28.285 28.285a8 8 0 0 0 11.315 11.314l28.284-28.284a56.065 56.065 0 0 0 0-79.196z" fill="currentColor"></path></svg></span>
	</a>
	<span>
		6. LoRA Fine-tuning
	</span>
</h4>
<p>To enable LoRA fine-tuning, add <code>--use_lora</code> to your training command. LoRA adapters will be saved in the checkpoint directory under <code>lora/</code>:</p>
<div class="relative group repo-copy-code"><pre><code class="language-bash">torchrun --nproc_per_node=8 train.py \
  --pretrained_model_root ./ckpts \
  --use_lora \
  --lora_r 8 \
  --lora_alpha 16 \
  --learning_rate 1e-4 \
  --output_dir ./outputs
</code></pre><button class="absolute top-3 right-3 transition opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-80"><svg class="" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" fill="currentColor" focusable="false" role="img" width="0.9em" height="0.9em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 32 32"><path d="M28,10V28H10V10H28m0-2H10a2,2,0,0,0-2,2V28a2,2,0,0,0,2,2H28a2,2,0,0,0,2-2V10a2,2,0,0,0-2-2Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><path d="M4,18H2V4A2,2,0,0,1,4,2H18V4H4Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><rect fill="none" width="32" height="32"></rect></svg></button></div>
<p>To load a pretrained LoRA adapter, use <code>--pretrained_lora_path</code>:</p>
<div class="relative group repo-copy-code"><pre><code class="language-bash">torchrun --nproc_per_node=8 train.py \
  --pretrained_model_root ./ckpts \
  --use_lora \
  --pretrained_lora_path ./outputs/checkpoint-1000/lora/default
</code></pre><button class="absolute top-3 right-3 transition opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-80"><svg class="" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" fill="currentColor" focusable="false" role="img" width="0.9em" height="0.9em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 32 32"><path d="M28,10V28H10V10H28m0-2H10a2,2,0,0,0-2,2V28a2,2,0,0,0,2,2H28a2,2,0,0,0,2-2V10a2,2,0,0,0-2-2Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><path d="M4,18H2V4A2,2,0,0,1,4,2H18V4H4Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><rect fill="none" width="32" height="32"></rect></svg></button></div>
<h2 class="relative group flex items-baseline">
	<a id="📊-evaluation" class="block pr-1.5 text-lg md:absolute md:p-1.5 md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100 md:right-full" href="#📊-evaluation" rel="nofollow">
		<span class="header-link"><svg class="text-gray-500 hover:text-black dark:hover:text-gray-200 w-4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="1em" height="1em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 256 256"><path d="M167.594 88.393a8.001 8.001 0 0 1 0 11.314l-67.882 67.882a8 8 0 1 1-11.314-11.315l67.882-67.881a8.003 8.003 0 0 1 11.314 0zm-28.287 84.86l-28.284 28.284a40 40 0 0 1-56.567-56.567l28.284-28.284a8 8 0 0 0-11.315-11.315l-28.284 28.284a56 56 0 0 0 79.196 79.197l28.285-28.285a8 8 0 1 0-11.315-11.314zM212.852 43.14a56.002 56.002 0 0 0-79.196 0l-28.284 28.284a8 8 0 1 0 11.314 11.314l28.284-28.284a40 40 0 0 1 56.568 56.567l-28.285 28.285a8 8 0 0 0 11.315 11.314l28.284-28.284a56.065 56.065 0 0 0 0-79.196z" fill="currentColor"></path></svg></span>
	</a>
	<span>
		📊 Evaluation
	</span>
</h2>
<h3 class="relative group flex items-baseline">
	<a id="rating" class="block pr-1.5 text-lg md:absolute md:p-1.5 md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100 md:right-full" href="#rating" rel="nofollow">
		<span class="header-link"><svg class="text-gray-500 hover:text-black dark:hover:text-gray-200 w-4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="1em" height="1em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 256 256"><path d="M167.594 88.393a8.001 8.001 0 0 1 0 11.314l-67.882 67.882a8 8 0 1 1-11.314-11.315l67.882-67.881a8.003 8.003 0 0 1 11.314 0zm-28.287 84.86l-28.284 28.284a40 40 0 0 1-56.567-56.567l28.284-28.284a8 8 0 0 0-11.315-11.315l-28.284 28.284a56 56 0 0 0 79.196 79.197l28.285-28.285a8 8 0 1 0-11.315-11.314zM212.852 43.14a56.002 56.002 0 0 0-79.196 0l-28.284 28.284a8 8 0 1 0 11.314 11.314l28.284-28.284a40 40 0 0 1 56.568 56.567l-28.285 28.285a8 8 0 0 0 11.315 11.314l28.284-28.284a56.065 56.065 0 0 0 0-79.196z" fill="currentColor"></path></svg></span>
	</a>
	<span>
		Rating
	</span>
</h3>
<p>We assess text-to-video generation using a comprehensive rating methodology that considers five key dimensions: text-video consistency, visual quality, structural stability, motion effects, and the aesthetic quality of individual frames. For image-to-video generation, the evaluation encompasses image-video consistency, instruction responsiveness, visual quality, structural stability, and motion effects.</p>

<h3 class="relative group flex items-baseline">
	<a id="gsb" class="block pr-1.5 text-lg md:absolute md:p-1.5 md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100 md:right-full" href="#gsb" rel="nofollow">
		<span class="header-link"><svg class="text-gray-500 hover:text-black dark:hover:text-gray-200 w-4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="1em" height="1em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 256 256"><path d="M167.594 88.393a8.001 8.001 0 0 1 0 11.314l-67.882 67.882a8 8 0 1 1-11.314-11.315l67.882-67.881a8.003 8.003 0 0 1 11.314 0zm-28.287 84.86l-28.284 28.284a40 40 0 0 1-56.567-56.567l28.284-28.284a8 8 0 0 0-11.315-11.315l-28.284 28.284a56 56 0 0 0 79.196 79.197l28.285-28.285a8 8 0 1 0-11.315-11.314zM212.852 43.14a56.002 56.002 0 0 0-79.196 0l-28.284 28.284a8 8 0 1 0 11.314 11.314l28.284-28.284a40 40 0 0 1 56.568 56.567l-28.285 28.285a8 8 0 0 0 11.315 11.314l28.284-28.284a56.065 56.065 0 0 0 0-79.196z" fill="currentColor"></path></svg></span>
	</a>
	<span>
		GSB
	</span>
</h3>
<p>The GSB(Good/Same/Bad) approach is widely used to evaluate the relative performance of two models based on overall video perception quality.We carefully construct 300 diverse text prompts and 300 image samples to cover balanced application scenarios for both text-to-video and image-to-video tasks. For each prompt or image input, an equal number of video samples are generated by each model in a single run to ensure comparability. To maintain fairness, inference is performed only once per input without any cherry-picking of results. All competing models are evaluated using their default configurations. The evaluation is conducted by over 100 professional assessors</p>

</div>

<div align="center">
<img src="/tencent/HunyuanVideo-1.5/resolve/main/assets/I2V_GSB.png" alt="gsb result of i2v" width="800">
</div> 


<h3 class="relative group flex items-baseline">
	<a id="inference-speed" class="block pr-1.5 text-lg md:absolute md:p-1.5 md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100 md:right-full" href="#inference-speed" rel="nofollow">
		<span class="header-link"><svg class="text-gray-500 hover:text-black dark:hover:text-gray-200 w-4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="1em" height="1em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 256 256"><path d="M167.594 88.393a8.001 8.001 0 0 1 0 11.314l-67.882 67.882a8 8 0 1 1-11.314-11.315l67.882-67.881a8.003 8.003 0 0 1 11.314 0zm-28.287 84.86l-28.284 28.284a40 40 0 0 1-56.567-56.567l28.284-28.284a8 8 0 0 0-11.315-11.315l-28.284 28.284a56 56 0 0 0 79.196 79.197l28.285-28.285a8 8 0 1 0-11.315-11.314zM212.852 43.14a56.002 56.002 0 0 0-79.196 0l-28.284 28.284a8 8 0 1 0 11.314 11.314l28.284-28.284a40 40 0 0 1 56.568 56.567l-28.285 28.285a8 8 0 0 0 11.315 11.314l28.284-28.284a56.065 56.065 0 0 0 0-79.196z" fill="currentColor"></path></svg></span>
	</a>
	<span>
		Inference speed
	</span>
</h3>
<p>We report inference speed with basic engineering-level acceleration techniques enabled on 8 H800 GPUs to demonstrate practical performance achievable in real-world deployment scenarios.
Please note that in this experiment, we do not pursue the most extreme acceleration at the cost of generation quality, but rather to achieve notable speed improvements while maintaining nearly identical output quality.</p>
